_comment: Defaults for the WC / TDI page. The TDI cap is editable on the page; commit this file to change the default everyone loads.

tdi.note: Per-employee TDI taxable wage cap, per quarter (Hawaii 2026: weekly wage base $1,500.21 x 13 weeks = $19,502.73). Each employee's quarterly covered wages are capped at this before summing.
